title: MrFEG's Furniture Stuffs
description:
This Mod Adds A Variety Of Furnitures To The Game That Actually Work!
Currently This Mod is in Under Development.

Trying My Best To Create A Quality Mod Please I Need Your Support Thank You
body:
WELCOME TO



![MrFEG's Furniture Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88bcb0935014e4589454929ebfaf12359f495096.png)


This Mod Adds Variety Of FURNITURES To The Game.

My Goal Is To Do More Furnitures That Actually ****Functions**** Rather Than Just A Decoration Piece.

I'll Try My Best To Do Quality Furnitures.Please Support Me For This Mod.

****THIS MOD IS NOW UNDER DEVELOPMENT MORE UPDATES WILL ADD LATER ON****.
